scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.build: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install && npm run build && cd .. && shx rm -rf public && shx mkdir -p public && shx cp -rf frontend/dist/* public/
scripts.vercel-build: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install && npm run build && cd .. && shx rm -rf public && shx mkdir -p public && shx cp -rf frontend/dist/* public/
